docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,885.74 FILED BY MCDONALD, CHRISTOPHER IAN AS TO DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-13-2025 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MCDONALD, CHRISTOPHER IAN ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-17-2025, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC.
SC-109 AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR DAN MCDOWELL FILED BY DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC.
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM DAN MCDOWELL FILED BY DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC.
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM DAN MCDOWELL FILED BY DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC.
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM GRANTED*** PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT. DAN MCDOWELL
REMARK: DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RECEIVED AT THE WINDOW.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-13-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-13-2025 BY JUDGE CARRIE ZEPEDA. PLAINTIFFS CHRISTOPHER IAN MCDONALD APPEARED. DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC. APPEARED VIA ZOOM, REPRESENTED BY DAN MCDOWELL, LEGAL INVESTIGATIONS ASSOCIATE. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE CARRIE ZEPEDA, CLERK: A. MOK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-13-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MCDONALD, CHRISTOPHER IAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC. $2,685.47 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,685.47 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUN-02-2025 ORDERED DESTROYED
